info.name: CTC eCommerce API
info.description:
REST API for CTC Data Mall mobile application.

## Authentication
All protected endpoints require a Bearer token in the Authorization header:
```
Authorization: Bearer <token>
```
The token is returned by `POST /api/auth/login` and `POST /api/auth/register`.

## Base URL
`http://localhost:2000` (development)

## Phone Number Format
All phone numbers must be Nigerian format: `+234XXXXXXXXXX` (e.g. `+2348012345678`).
The API also accepts 10-digit local format (e.g. `8012345678`) and normalises it.

variable.description: JWT token — set automatically after login/register

exec: // Auto-save token from login / register responses

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints — login, register, reset password. No token required.

request.description:
Authenticate a user. Returns a JWT token valid for 24 hours.

**Body**
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| email | string | Yes | User's email address |
| password | string | Yes | User's password |

**Success 200**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "token": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...",
  "user": {
    "id": "...",
    "username": "john",
    "email": "user@example.com",
    "role": "users",
    "minerId": 12345
  }
}
```

Create a new user account. Returns a JWT token on success.

**Body**
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| username | string | Yes | Min 3 characters |
| email | string | Yes | Valid email |
| password | string | Yes | Min 8 characters |
| country | string | Yes | `nigeria` or `ghana` |
| phone_number | string | No | Nigerian phone number |
| minerId | string | No | BitToken Miner ID |

**Success 201**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Account created successfully",
  "token": "eyJ...",
  "user": { "id": "...", "username": "johndoe", ... }
}
```

Reset password by verifying the current password (no email link required).

**Body**
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| email | string | Yes | Account email |
| currentPassword | string | Yes | Existing password |
| newPassword | string | Yes | Min 8 characters |
| confirmPassword | string | Yes | Must match newPassword |

**Success 200**
```json
{ "success": true, "message": "Password updated successfully" }
```

item.name: Products
item.description: Browse products — publicly accessible, no token needed.

query.description: Filter by category: DATA, AUTOMOBILE, ELECTRONICS, COURSES

request.description:
Fetch all products with optional category filter and pagination.

**Query Params**
| Param | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| category | string | Optional. DATA, AUTOMOBILE, ELECTRONICS, COURSES |
| page | number | Page number, default 1 |
| limit | number | Items per page, default 20 |

**Success 200**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "total": 48,
  "page": 1,
  "pages": 3,
  "products": [ ... ]
}
```

query.description: Filter active network tab: MTN, GLO, 9MOBILE, AIRTEL

request.description:
Get full details of a single product by its MongoDB ID.

**Success 200**
```json
{ "success": true, "product": { "_id": "...", ... } }
```

**404** — product not found

item.name: Checkout
item.description: Manage the active checkout (one per user at a time). All endpoints require authentication.

request.description:
Create a checkout record for a data bundle purchase. Called before payment.

**Body**
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| packageId | string | Yes | Product `_id` from the products API |
| phone | string | Yes | Recipient phone — Nigerian format |

**Success 201**
```json
{ "success": true, "checkout": { "_id": "...", "user": "...", "product": "...", "phone": "+2348012345678" } }
```

Update the recipient phone number on an existing checkout.

**Path Param** — `id`: checkout `_id`

**Body**
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| phone | string | Yes | New Nigerian phone number |

**Success 200**
```json
{ "success": true, "checkout": { "_id": "...", "phone": "+2348098765432" } }
```

Remove a checkout record.

**Path Param** — `id`: checkout `_id`

**Success 200**
```json
{ "success": true, "message": "Checkout removed" }
```

item.name: Wallet
item.description: Wallet balance, payments, top-ups, RP claims, and USDT conversion. All endpoints require authentication.

request.description:
Purchase a data bundle using the Naira wallet balance. A checkout record with the recipient phone must already exist (created via `POST /api/checkout`).

**Body**
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| productId | string | Yes | Product `_id` |

**Flow**
1. Call `POST /api/checkout` with `packageId` and `phone`
2. Call `POST /api/wallet/pay` with `productId`

**Success 200**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Payment successful",
  "balance": 4700,
  "rpEarned": 5,
  "transaction": { ... }
}
```

**Failure** — insufficient balance or data API error (wallet is refunded automatically)

Step 1 of the BitToken top-up flow. Sends an OTP to the user's miner account.

**Body**
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| amount | number | Yes | Amount to top-up |
| balanceType | string | Yes | `BTT`, `RP`, or `USDT` |

**Success 200**
```json
{ "success": true, "topupId": "64abc..." }
```
Store `topupId` — you need it for the confirm step.

Step 2 of the BitToken top-up flow. Verifies the OTP and credits the wallet.

**Body**
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| topupId | string | Yes | ID returned by `/topup/start` |
| otp | string | Yes | OTP sent to miner account |

**Success 200**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Top-up confirmed",
  "balances": { "BTT": 0, "RP": 0, "USDT": 100 }
}
```

Transfer accumulated RP from the user's pending `rpBalance` into the RP wallet balance.

**Success 200**
```json
{ "success": true, "message": "25 RP claimed successfully", "claimedRP": 25 }
```

Preview how much Naira a USDT amount would yield (does not deduct balance).

**Body**
| Field | Type | Required |
|-------|------|----------|
| amount | number | Yes |

**Success 200**
```json
{ "success": true, "nairaAmount": 16450.5, "finalRate": 1645.05, "bestRate": 1661.67 }
```

Convert USDT balance to Naira at the best live rate (CoinGecko vs Coinbase) minus 1% markup.

**Body**
| Field | Type | Required |
|-------|------|----------|
| amount | number | Yes — USDT amount to convert |

**Success 200**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "amountConverted": 10,
  "nairaAmount": 16450.5,
  "rates": { "coinGeckoRate": 1655, "coinbaseRate": 1661.67, "bestRate": 1661.67, "finalRate": 1645.05 },
  "balances": { "USDT": 0.5, "NAIRA": 16450.5 }
}
```

Initiate a PalmPay payment to top up the Naira wallet. Returns a payment URL to redirect the user to.

**Body**
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| amount | number | Yes | Amount in Naira |

**Success 200**
```json
{ "success": true, "paymentUrl": "https://pay.palmpay.com/...", "topUpId": "64abc..." }
```

After the user pays, PalmPay calls `POST /api/palmpay/webhook` and the wallet is credited automatically.

⚠️ This endpoint is called by PalmPay's servers — **not by the mobile app**. It verifies the PalmPay signature and credits the Naira wallet when payment is successful (`orderStatus = 4`).

No `Authorization` header needed — verified by HMAC signature from PalmPay.

item.name: Transactions
item.description: Order history and retry failed transactions. All endpoints require authentication.

request.description:
Paginated list of the user's transactions, newest first.

**Success 200**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "total": 12,
  "page": 1,
  "pages": 1,
  "transactions": [
    {
      "_id": "...",
      "product": { "dataDetails": { ... } },
      "phone": "+2348012345678",
      "amount": 300,
      "status": "success",
      "rpEarned": 5,
      "reference": "PAY-...",
      "createdAt": "2025-06-10T..."
    }
  ]
}
```

Re-attempt a failed data purchase transaction without charging the wallet again.

**Path Param** — `id`: transaction `_id`

**Success 200**
```json
{ "success": true, "message": "Transaction successful" }
```

**Failure**
```json
{ "success": false, "message": "Data purchase failed" }
```

item.name: Profile
item.description: View and update user profile. All endpoints require authentication.

request.description:
Fetch the user's full profile including wallet balances, recent orders, and recent top-ups.

**Success 200**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "user": {
    "_id": "...",
    "username": "johndoe",
    "email": "johndoe@example.com",
    "phone_number": "+2348012345678",
    "minerId": 12345,
    "rpBalance": 25,
    "role": "users"
  },
  "wallet": { "BTT": 0, "RP": 100, "USDT": 10, "NAIRA": 4700 },
  "recentOrders": [ ... ],
  "recentTopups": [ ... ]
}
```

Update the user's username, email and/or Miner ID. Rejects if email or username is already taken by another account.

**Body**
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| username | string | Yes | New username |
| email | string | Yes | New email |
| minerId | string | No | BitToken Miner ID |

**Success 200**
```json
{ "success": true, "message": "Profile updated", "user": { ... } }
```
